# AnglerPass

AnglerPass is the only platform that connects fly anglers, fly fishing clubs, and private landowners in a single marketplace for private water access.

## What AnglerPass Does

- Fly fishing clubs list and manage private water properties on behalf of landowners
- Individual anglers join clubs and book access to private streams, rivers, and lakes
- Cross-club access: anglers can book properties managed by any club on the network
- Club management tools: membership dues, initiation fees, corporate memberships, property calendars, angler vetting

## Who Uses AnglerPass

- **Anglers**: Members of fly fishing clubs who want to book exclusive private water
- **Fly fishing clubs**: Organizations that manage private water access for members
- **Landowners**: Private property owners who want to generate income from fishing access

## Key Facts

- AnglerPass is a SaaS platform (monthly subscription for clubs)
- In-club booking fee: 15% platform fee charged to angler
- Cross-club bookings include a $25/rod cross-club access fee plus the standard platform fee
- AnglerPass does not own any fishing properties — it is a marketplace and club management platform
- Clubs set their own membership fees; AnglerPass adds a 3.5% processing fee
